violations.text: The cutting boards in the back prep area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2026
The tile floor in the kitchen area has area of low grout. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/02/2026
